zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley於大約1444年出生在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆 卡素時，他的父親Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight41歲，母親Elizabeth Hungerford43歲。他於1465年與Elizabeth de Pomeroy在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年4月23日在英國戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley于大约1444年出生在英国英格兰戴文波德哈姆 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight41岁，母亲Elizabeth Hungerford43岁。他于1465年与Elizabeth de Pomeroy在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年4月23日在英国戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley was born about 1444, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth Hungerford, was 43. He married Elizabeth de Pomeroy in 1465, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 April 1496, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley est né environ 1444, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hungerford, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Pomeroy en 1465, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1496, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley um 1444 in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight 41 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hungerford 43. Er hat 1465 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Pomeroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1496 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Powderham Castle, Devon, England und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Courtenay of Bickleyが約1444年にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knightは41歳，母Elizabeth Hungerfordは43歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイでElizabeth de Pomeroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年4月23日にイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley(이)가 대략 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hungerford(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 Elizabeth de Pomeroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 4월 23일 영국 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley nasceu aproximadamente 1444, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hungerford, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Pomeroy em 1465, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1496, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley родился около 1444 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hungerford, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Pomeroy в 1465 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1496 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley nació aproximadamente 1444, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hungerford, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Pomeroy en 1465, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1496, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
